meta_sendiks_geo_performance.note: Sendiks-targeted creatives performing significantly worse vs broad audience

patterns: ORIGIN STORY + WISCONSIN ANGLE drives highest ad efficiency: 'Straight From Wisconsin' headline delivers $0.09 CPC and 5.73% CTR vs $0.16 CPC average. Local authenticity is the strongest hook.

TUTORIAL/PRO TIPS content consistently tops engagement across ALL platforms: Founder Pro Tips reel (IG: 35.79% ER), Pro Tips video (FB: #2 post 56 engagements), Pro Tips TikTok (339 views). Agency should prioritize utility-first content.

ASMR/TEXTURE FORMAT outperforms on YouTube: ASMR pizza video leads with 2,206 views and 118% completion (rewatches). Grocery Haul leads completion at 126.78%. Sound-centric content earns deeper viewing - lean into this.
RELATABLE HUMOR beats product shots on TikTok: 'Oh, you're buying? Stocking up' is 2.4x the views of next closest TikTok. Humor/meme format must be the TikTok strategy.

FOUNDER NARRATIVE has high engagement but limited reach: Founder story posts rank #1-2 engagement on IG/FB but not in top reach. This content is loved by existing audience - needs paid amplification to break out to new audiences.

META AGE DEMO ANOMALY: 65+ receiving highest spend ($1,368 = 25.8% of budget) and highest clicks (10,621) but not the core buyer demo (IG audience is 35-44 female). Recommend reviewing Meta age targeting to shift budget toward 25-44.
BRANDED SEARCH is hyper-efficient: Google Branded campaign = $0.19 CPC with 10.41% CTR vs $0.40 NB and $0.68 competitor. Branded search is being underinvested - only $277 spend vs $1,060 on NB.

RETAILER-SPECIFIC GEO TARGETING underperforming: Sendiks-targeted ads show CPC 10x higher ($1.51 vs $0.16) suggesting hyper-geo audiences are too narrow. Broaden to metro area rather than retailer-specific.
INSTAGRAM AUDIENCE skews heavily female 35-44 (41%) - content and messaging should speak directly to this demo: practical, quality-conscious, family-minded parents who care about ingredients.

FACEBOOK engagement concentrating on educational posts: Top 3 FB posts are all information-dense content (sourdough science, baking tips, founder story). Less lifestyle, more education for FB audience.
YOUTUBE subscriber growth is slow (17 YTD): Despite solid view counts (10K), subscription conversion is minimal. Add clearer subscribe CTAs in videos and description.
TIKTOK overall low volume: 28 followers, 4,579 views YTD suggests very early stage. Strategy should focus on 2-3 viral formats (humor, ASMR, tutorials) rather than posting breadth.
recommendations: Increase 'Straight From Wisconsin' creative spend - it's the most efficient creative ($0.09 CPC, 5.73% CTR) and significantly underinvested vs 'No More Cardboard Crust'
Shift Meta budget allocation away from 65+ demo toward 25-44 - 65+ receiving 25.8% of spend but is unlikely to be the primary buyer
Increase Google Branded campaign budget - $0.19 CPC with 10.41% CTR is leaving money on the table vs NB and Competitor campaigns
Produce monthly Pro Tips / Tutorial content for all platforms - this format is the consistent top performer across Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok
Test paid amplification of founder story content on Meta - high engagement when reached but organic reach limited; $500-1000 boost test recommended
Expand Sendiks geo targeting from retailer-specific to broader Milwaukee metro - narrow targeting is causing CPC to spike 10x
Explore ASMR video series for YouTube - top video at 118% completion rate; develop 4-6 part ASMR series (slice, pour, bake, crunch)
Add explicit subscribe CTAs in all YouTube videos - 10K views but only 17 subscribers YTD suggests CTA gap
